title: Vietnamese-Style Grilled Pilchards
description: A fusion of Japanese and Vietnamese flavors, this dish combines the rich taste of grilled pilchards with the bold flavors of Southeast Asia.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Rinse the pilchards and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the fish sauce, fish sauce (if using), garlic, and brown sugar.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the pilchards.
Grill the pilchards for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are cooked through.
While the pilchards are cooking, mix together the vietnamese chili sauce and soy sauce in a small bowl.
Once the pilchards are cooked, brush them with the sesame oil and serve with the vietnamese chili sauce mixture.
Serve with a squeeze of lime juice and garnish with cilantro or scallions, if desired.
Optional: grill sliced onions and bell peppers alongside the pilchards for added flavor and texture.
